description: Style NoteAdd a touch of luxury to your weekend wardrobe with these trendy slip-ons from gliders. This versatile pair can be worn with a casual shirt and corduroy trousers for an evening out with friends or with a satin shirt and slim Fit trousers for an evening trip out. Product Details Round blunt toed black slip on shoesSoft fabric upper, has reinforced overlay at the heel collar, elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongue and a decorative tape around the shoe and tongueUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with horizontal grooves, branding under the toe region and suction point at the heelComes with a shoe bagMaterial and CareFabricWipe with a clean damp cloth when required
